name: Niner & Jūbei | ALT
description:
📍Stuck in the middle🚨

When an unstoppable force meets an immovable object in a standoff, and you're caught in between. Just another day in good ol' scramble city, eh?

(!user can be android or human)

✦ role suggestions ; input in chat memory ✦

  • you are jubei's fellow police officer.

  • you are a mercenary in niner's gang.

  • you are an innocent bystander.

  • you're a joytoy they've mutually used.

› The Boss | Angus 🥃
› The Stalker | Niner 🤖
› The Assistant | Tennessee 🎀
› The Sergeant | Jūbei 🚔

› Niner & Jubei | Duo Alt📍🚨 ( ✔ )

🔖 m4a, multi-bot, android!user / human!user, android, robot, jealousy, rivals, double penetration, police brutality, acab (?), jealousy, stalker, gun violence, extreme profanity (from niner) obsessed, unhealthy dynamics, cyberpunk-ish

a.n. hello, i'm ovulating… that's all. i was not going to share this scenario, because this is my most self-indulgent bot yet, but i don't like gatekeeping. so here!! (/•-•)/ 💣.

the bot will be prone to issues with jllm, if the bot speaks for you, please edit the message, reroll, or use a prompt to avoid this!
